case_title: ROLLINGTON FERGUSON VS. ABM PARKING SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, ROLLINGTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABM PARKING SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FERGUSON, ROLLINGTON AS TO DEFENDANT ABM PARKING SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ABM PARKING SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM CHANG--OPERATION MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $25.00) SERVED NOV-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABM PARKING SERVICES, INC.
